sys_ui_page.description: 2.7.0 | 2021-08-28 | mmcc | STRY0107404 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal New UI Page to prompt about Task and subtasks when deleting from Platform
sys_ui_page.html:
var styleSheets = []; styleSheets.push("tasker-delete-task-prompt.css"); var linkTags = []; for (var sheet in styleSheets) { var css = new GlideRecord("content_css"); css.addQuery("name", styleSheets[sheet]); css.query(); css.next(); linkTags.push(css.sys_id+".cssdbx?ver="+css.sys_updated_on); } Warning Tasker - You are about to permanently delete this task. Are you sure you want to continue? Tasker - If this task has subtask, they will also be deleted

${gs.getMessage('Warning')}!

${jvar_taskNumberShortDescription}
${gs.getMessage('Tasker - You are about to permanently delete this task. Are you sure you want to continue?')}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - If this task has subtask(s), they will also be deleted')}


${gs.getMessage('cancel')} ${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Delete Task')}
sys_ui_page.name: delete_task_prompt
